metadata.description: OpenADLC, the human-in-the-loop development lifecycle for AI coding agents: an open standard with a source-available reference implementation (free for individuals; organizations need a commercial seat). The always-on adlc-core spine (the four /ai-* commands + the lifecycle checkpoints) plus domain packs.

plugins.name: adlc-ai
plugins.description: AI/LLM engineering domain: integrate LLMs into apps and services (Anthropic SDK-first), prompt engineering, evals, RAG, agent architecture, safety/guardrails, on-device AI; ai-architect + ai-reviewer agents. Serves product AI features and AI tooling.

plugins.name: adlc-android
plugins.description: Android domain: action skills, WebView engineering, 10 on-demand convention rules; android-reviewer + android-architect agents.

plugins.name: adlc-backend
plugins.description: Thin backend domain for solo-scale products: modular-monolith architecture, API design, auth, background jobs, game-server bits. Managed services, no K8s. Routes deploy to adlc-ops, data layer to adlc-database.

plugins.name: adlc-core
plugins.description: ALWAYS-ON spine (deploy globally): the four /ai-* commands, lifecycle checkpoints, software design, codebase research, decision records. Outbound steps stop and ask for explicit consent.

plugins.name: adlc-design
plugins.description: Cross-cutting design domain, loaded only when work touches Figma (the only supported design tool): Figma skills, the design-token pipeline, UI craft and anti-generic doctrine, accessibility, design-critic agent.

plugins.name: adlc-ios
plugins.description: iOS domain: SwiftUI-first action skills, SPM interface/impl modules, KMP interop, App Store compliance, on-demand convention references; ios-architect + ios-reviewer agents.

plugins.name: adlc-monetization
plugins.description: Monetization and live-ops domain: native IAP with server receipt validation, F2P economy design, live-ops, ads mediation, A/B experimentation. Engine-agnostic; Unity SDK wiring lives in adlc-unity.

plugins.name: adlc-ops
plugins.description: Operations domain for launched products: crash/error monitoring, product analytics, observability, CI/CD pipeline authoring, managed-cloud deploy. Solo-scale, no K8s (see adlc-backend-cloud).

plugins.name: adlc-planning
plugins.description: Deeper planning: revise/resume a plan, define API/module contracts, analyze a ticket's impact; architect, adlc-author, implementation-lead, and story-implementer agents.

plugins.name: adlc-privacy
plugins.description: Privacy and data-protection domain: GDPR/CCPA engineering, consent management (ATT/UMP), F2P games compliance (gacha odds, loot-box law, COPPA), data-flow audit, OSS license scanning.

plugins.name: adlc-quality-gates
plugins.description: Readiness gates (deployment, plan, traceability) + skill structure/efficacy checks.

plugins.name: adlc-security
plugins.description: Security: OWASP MASVS/MASTG + API Top 10, domain-adaptive SAST + secret scanning, negative testing, pentest mindset, threat taxonomy; security-reviewer; /adlc-security-review.

plugins.name: adlc-testing
plugins.description: Test strategy, scenario expansion, architecture conformance, validation contracts; test-critic agent; /validate-scenario.

plugins.name: adlc-unity
plugins.description: Unity game domain (C#): build/test via the Unity MCP, assembly architecture, deterministic simulation for real-time PvP, mobile performance, UI Toolkit, monetization SDK wiring. For F2P mobile games.

plugins.name: adlc-web
plugins.description: Web frontend domain: framework-agnostic typed components (detect-first: React/Vue/Svelte/Angular), state management, forms, the SSR/edge boundary, web performance. Pairs with adlc-design.

plugins.name: adlc-database
plugins.description: Data domain: schema design (SQL/NoSQL, detect-first), safe zero-downtime migrations, query and index optimization, and the data-access layer. adlc-backend routes data-layer depth here.

plugins.name: adlc-desktop
plugins.description: Desktop app domain (Electron/Tauri/native, detect-first): process/IPC security, native OS integration, packaging/signing/notarization. Distinct from the OpenADLC desktop product.

plugins.name: adlc-backend-cloud
plugins.description: Enterprise/team-scale backend tier (opt-in scale-up from adlc-backend's solo monolith): containers, Kubernetes, infrastructure-as-code, async messaging, distributed data, progressive delivery.
